## Diagram 1

```mermaid
graph TD
    Start([Execute: /fv-net/ GitLab root])
    PublishQueue["publish.sh: queue processor<br>(./Fv.Net.Queue.Processor/shipment-active-shipment.json)"]
    PublishStale["publish.sh: stale record reset<br>(./Fv.Net.DatabaseCommandProcessor/rules/shipments-active-shipment-stale-queue-reset.json)"]
    SetStages["Set CURRENT_STAGES = 'test'"]
    Loop(("For each CURRENT_STAGE in CURRENT_STAGES"))
    ListTargets["aws events list-targets-by-rule<br>--profile fvprod --region us-east-1<br>--rule '$CURRENT_STAGE-$BASE_RULE_NAME'"]
    HasTargets{Targets found?}
    RemoveTargets["aws events remove-targets<br>--profile fvprod --region us-east-1<br>--ids $TARGET_IDS"]
    Echo["echo 'Deleting the rule: $CURRENT_STAGE-$BASE_RULE_NAME'"]
    DeleteRule["aws events delete-rule<br>--profile fvprod --region us-east-1<br>--name '$CURRENT_STAGE-$BASE_RULE_NAME'"]
    End([Done])

    Start --> PublishQueue
    PublishQueue --> PublishStale
    PublishStale --> SetStages
    SetStages --> Loop
    Loop --> ListTargets
    ListTargets --> HasTargets
    HasTargets -- "yes" --> RemoveTargets
    RemoveTargets --> Echo
    HasTargets -- "no" --> Echo
    Echo --> DeleteRule
    DeleteRule --> Loop
    Loop -->|No more stages| End
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant S as Shell
    participant P as publish.sh
    participant A as AWS
    S->>P: ./publish.sh "test" fvprod us-east-1 shipments ./Fv.Net.Queue.Processor/ ./Fv.Net.Queue.Processor/shipment-active-shipment.json 1 ./Fv.Net.Queue.Processor/rules/shipment-active-shipment.json ENABLED
    P->>A: PutRule / PutTargets (create shipment-active-shipment rule)
    S->>P: ./publish.sh "test" fvprod us-east-1 shipments ./Fv.Net.DatabaseCommandProcessor "" -1 ./Fv.Net.DatabaseCommandProcessor/rules/shipments-active-shipment-stale-queue-reset.json ENABLED
    P->>A: PutRule / PutTargets (create stale-queue-reset rule)
    S->>S: Set CURRENT_STAGES = 'test'
    loop For each CURRENT_STAGE
        S->>A: aws events list-targets-by-rule --profile fvprod --region us-east-1 --rule 'test-net-shipments-active_shipment-processor'
        A-->>S: TARGET_IDS (text or empty)
        alt TARGET_IDS non-empty
            S->>A: aws events remove-targets --profile fvprod --region us-east-1 --ids $TARGET_IDS
            A-->>S: Removed
        end
        S->>S: echo 'Deleting the rule: test-net-shipments-active_shipment-processor'
        S->>A: aws events delete-rule --profile fvprod --region us-east-1 --name 'test-net-shipments-active_shipment-processor'
        A-->>S: Deleted
    end
```
